globalHeaders.content-security-policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://assets.calendly.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://*.calendly.com https://*.googleusercontent.com; connect-src 'self' https://api.web3forms.com https://assets.calendly.com; frame-src https://calendly.com https://*.calendly.com; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self' https://api.web3forms.com;
